targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(useragent_group, 'unknown') AS useragent_group, COALESCE(upstream_transport, 'unknown') AS upstream_transport, COALESCE(model, 'unknown') AS model, COUNT(*) AS requests, percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_first_token_ms) AS p50_ttft_ms, percentile_cont(0.9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_first_token_ms) AS p90_ttft_ms, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_first_token_ms) AS p95_ttft_ms, AVG(latency_response_created_ms) AS avg_response_created_ms, AVG(latency_first_upstream_event_ms) AS avg_first_upstream_event_ms, AVG(latency_response_create_gate_wait_ms) AS avg_gate_wait_ms, AVG(latency_bridge_queue_wait_ms) AS avg_bridge_queue_wait_ms, AVG(latency_ms) AS avg_total_ms, percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p50_total_ms, percentile_cont(0.9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p90_total_ms, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p95_total_ms FROM request_logs WHERE requested_at >= now() - interval '24 hours' GROUP BY useragent_group, upstream_transport, model ORDER BY requests DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT COALESCE(prewarm_status, 'unknown') AS prewarm, COUNT(*) AS requests, percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_first_token_ms) AS p50_ttft_ms, percentile_cont(0.9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_first_token_ms) AS p90_ttft_ms, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_first_token_ms) AS p95_ttft_ms, percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p50_total_ms, percentile_cont(0.9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p90_total_ms, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p95_total_ms FROM request_logs WHERE requested_at >= now() - interval '24 hours' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY requests DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN session_previous_gap_ms IS NULL THEN 'unknown' WHEN session_previous_gap_ms < 120000 THEN 'lt_2m' WHEN session_previous_gap_ms < 600000 THEN '2m_10m' ELSE 'gte_10m' END AS session_gap_cohort, COUNT(*) AS requests, percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_first_token_ms) AS p50_ttft_ms, percentile_cont(0.9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_first_token_ms) AS p90_ttft_ms, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_first_token_ms) AS p95_ttft_ms, percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p50_total_ms, percentile_cont(0.9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p90_total_ms, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p95_total_ms FROM request_logs WHERE requested_at >= now() - interval '24 hours' GROUP BY session_gap_cohort ORDER BY requests DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN input_tokens IS NULL THEN 'unknown' WHEN input_tokens < 2000 THEN 'lt_2k' WHEN input_tokens < 10000 THEN '2k_10k' WHEN input_tokens < 50000 THEN '10k_50k' ELSE '50k_plus' END AS prompt_size_cohort, CASE WHEN input_tokens IS NULL OR input_tokens = 0 THEN 'cache_unknown' WHEN COALESCE(cached_input_tokens, 0) * 1.0 / input_tokens >= 0.75 THEN 'cache_75_100' WHEN COALESCE(cached_input_tokens, 0) * 1.0 / input_tokens >= 0.25 THEN 'cache_25_75' ELSE 'cache_0_25' END AS cache_ratio, COUNT(*) AS requests, percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_first_token_ms) AS p50_ttft_ms, percentile_cont(0.9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_first_token_ms) AS p90_ttft_ms, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_first_token_ms) AS p95_ttft_ms, percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p50_total_ms, percentile_cont(0.9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p90_total_ms, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p95_total_ms FROM request_logs WHERE requested_at >= now() - interval '24 hours' GROUP BY prompt_size_cohort, cache_ratio ORDER BY requests DESC

panels.title: 24h TTFT By Prompt Size And Cache
